title: scepocarpus flamignianus
side_effects: Scepocarpus flamignianus can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, dizziness, and stomach upset, which may be caused by excessive consumption of its extracts. In severe cases, improper use of the plant can lead to allergic reactions, including skin irritation and respiratory problems. Some individuals may also experience headaches, fatigue, and insomnia due to its potential interaction with other medications. Additionally, consuming large amounts of the plant's extracts can cause liver damage and kidney problems in rare cases.
